focus_area: Session 2026-04-26 wrapped: shipped PR #54 (#39 semantic chunking — section-as-note schema + atomic insert_note_with_sections RPC + per-section LLM fan-out + 48 new tests, squash 0ac920a). Council ran 7 rounds: REVISE r1 -> PROCEED r2 -> PROCEED r3 -> PROCEED r4 -> REVISE r5 -> REVISE r6 -> PROCEED r7. All blockers folded except db-tests continue-on-error (rebutted per r5 §5 out-of-scope; investigation findings posted to issue #7). New project tooling: .claude/agents/postgres-expert.md subagent for SECURITY DEFINER reviews. Next session priority order: (1) #7 dedicated PR (investigation reduced this from unknown CI issue to two specific blockers with workarounds), (2) remove MAX_BODY_CHARS=500_000 stopgap from flashcard-gen.ts now that section-as-note ships, (3) Anthropic prompt caching on simplify + flashcard-gen handlers. See SESSION_HANDOFF.md for full pointer + active_plan.md handoff stub.
last_council: 2026-04-26T06:28:46+00:00 (PR #54 r7 PROCEED 10/10/10/10/10/9 — first 10 on bugs across the arc; only soft note was that orthogonal infra (postgres-expert agent + CI guardrail) should have been separate PRs).
notes: Completed arcs (cumulative): PR #22 (PKCE callback), PR #25 (PR #22 reflection + council-on-knowledge-content rule), PR #28 (issue #26 auth hardening), PR #29 (PR #28 reflection + #31 magic-link fold), PR #27 (magic-link template fix), PR #35 (stale-link classification a742deb), PR #37 (B2 flashcard handler e52866c), PR #42 (issue #38 /review UI 8b7977b), PR #43 (PR #42 reflection + new CLAUDE.md rules: §Rebutting council findings + §Plan-time required content), PR #48 (FSRS scoring 8906ba3), PR #49 (gitignore orphan da0c8fae), PR #51 (Tier E fail-closed bd6f22c), PR #50 (PR #48 reflection 0c51c19), PR #53 (session-end handoff 2026-04-25 e2b63d4), PR #54 (#39 semantic chunking 0ac920a — atomic-RPC + chunker + Voyage retry + 48 tests + postgres-expert subagent). Open follow-ups (all filed, none blocking): #7 db-tests blocking gate (now has full investigation comment from PR #54), #52 CI guardrail full impl (PR #54 shipped a partial allowlist mitigation), #47 server-side pagination on /review, #46 PR title hygiene automation, #45 council reflection-PR detection, #44 Zod runtime row validation, #41 sanitize-at-write vs sanitize-at-render eval, #36 mapSupabaseError diagnostic logging, #34 Pino structured logger, #33 shared type / lint rule for monitor contract, #32 Set-Cookie rollback assertion strengthening, #20 Playwright nonce smoke, #19 PR #17 r4 nice-to-haves, #18 framework persona, #15 CSP style-src hardening, #14 CSP report-uri, #12 /diag removal, #6 storage RLS. Deferred polish (unfiled, from PR #54 + earlier): remove MAX_BODY_CHARS stopgap (now vestigial after #39), Anthropic prompt caching on simplify+flashcard-gen, sections-per-doc monitoring metric, delete_note_with_sections RPC (when delete UI ships), Voyage embedding batching, parent-note TOC summary (vs. retain full body), parent-note embedding (currently skip if oversized), review.card_count i18n key, counter on generateIdempotencyKey fallback path. Institutional knowledge added this session: .claude/agents/postgres-expert.md subagent definition (project-scoped, reusable for SECURITY DEFINER reviews), CI silent-skip guardrail in ci.yml validate job (allowlist of high-leverage suites — partial #52 mitigation), down-migration pre-flight check pattern (errors if DROP COLUMN would lose data — applied to notes_section_hierarchy_down). Working hypothesis at session close: the plan-first protocol scales to longer arcs (7 council rounds for PR #54). Bugs trajectory 5 -> 10 across rounds shows the 'sustained-REVISE = fold' rule fires correctly even when council non-monotonically dips (r5 -> r6 went 9 -> 6 not because of regression but because council looked deeper at the larger phase 3 diff, and r7 hit 10 after the folds). Total workspace tests: ~449 (was 401; +48 new). Deployment requirements: supabase db push for migrations 20260424000001 + 20260424000002 + 20260426000001 + 20260426000002. Known CI noise: db-tests flake (#7) — investigation now shows the blockers are (a) supabase CLI splitter on migration 4's RETURNS TABLE+RETURN NEXT body, (b) supavisor container ulimit fail on GHA runner. Both have workarounds documented on issue #7. Session-end handoff PR (this commit) updates session_state.json + active_plan.md (handoff stub) + yolo_log + learnings entry + new SESSION_HANDOFF.md + new BACKLOG.md — council-required because of the learnings touch.
